infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: FetchIt uses the camera so you can photograph the contents of a box and add it to your inventory.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: FetchIt needs access to your photo library so you can attach existing photos to a box.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: FetchIt can save box photos back to your photo library.

plugins.photosPermission: FetchIt needs access to your photo library so you can attach existing photos to a box.
plugins.cameraPermission: FetchIt uses the camera so you can photograph the contents of a box and add it to your inventory.
